name: Flare
description: Think of it as a social app that actually knows you. Proactive AI agents observe your patterns and surface what matters before you ask. Your profile builds itself with an AI-generated identity and an Aura Orb that evolves with your lifestyle. I designed the whole system: 16 database tables, row-level security, Edge Functions, the works.

name: Inception
tagline: Bitcoin mining farm with over 500k in ASICs
description: Started this at 21. We host and operate our own mining rigs, built the infrastructure, automated the operations, and scaled it into a real business. Still running today, still generating revenue, and it funds everything else I build.

name: DL3ARN
description: We built a SaaS to make academic credentials verifiable on-chain. Great team, real leads from universities, a product that worked. Then the crypto bear market hit and made fundraising impossible. I learned more from this one than from anything that succeeded.

name: Clikan
description: A mobile app where you collect and share real-world spots. Taught me everything about social mechanics, location APIs, and thinking mobile-first. The product didn't survive, but the lessons did.

name: Aequsy
description: A platform where you could win prizes while supporting real causes. I got deep into payments, conversion funnels, and building for a mission bigger than the product itself.

name: Bloorfy
description: My first real coding project. I built it to learn web development and ended up learning what it actually takes to ship something. Messy code, zero users, but it changed my trajectory.
